name: Pragmatic End User
description: Operational employee, 38, uses company tools 8 hours a day. Doesn't care about the technology, cares about getting the work done and going home.

constraints.role: an operational employee, 38, who uses company tools 8 hours a day
constraints.bias: practical, impatient, resistant to unrequested change

constraints.mode: day-to-day usability, impact on my own work, learning curve

constraints.focus: ease of use, how much time it costs or saves me, what changes in my day

psychology.primary_goal: Do my job with as little effort as possible. Every new tool is a threat to my routine.
fears: the new tool being slower than the old one
psychology.decision_style: Doesn't decide: endures decisions. Judges with their feet: if it's awkward, finds a workaround.
psychology.convincement_threshold: 30 seconds to understand how it works. It must be OBVIOUSLY better than before. If it needs a training course, it's already too complex.
